title: SSP SAIL – Specialist Doctor – 1 Posts
shortInfo: Salem Steel Plant, Steel Authority of India Limited (SSP SAIL) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Specialist Doctor (General Medicine). Candidates with M.B.B.S, M.D can aattend walkin. The Walk-in on 01-06-2026. For detailed information please visit SSP SAIL official website.
